subcodes.first_line: The Tablet hath become manifest, and from its horizon hath shone forth the luminary of loving-kindness and grace, through the bounty of God, the Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر اللوح و لاح من افقه نیر العنایه و الالطاف فضلا من لدی الله مولی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
